honesty_markers.HM-35: Causal chain is observational, NOT randomized. All causal effect estimates carry unobserved-confounder bias.
honesty_markers.HM-36: DAG structure depends on literature-supported assumptions (Reactome R-HSA-4085001, T cell biology). Incomplete background knowledge.
honesty_markers.HM-37: CATE shows substantial variance across 4 cohorts (heterogeneity). Per-cohort estimates may not generalize.
